text: I feel a sense of curiosity and intellectual engagement being here. The glass-walled room bustling with attentive individuals hints at collective inquiry or creation, fostering a subtle camaraderie of purpose. Moving towards the exhibit labeled 'R+D,' I sense the celebration of research, inquiry, and innovation. The vibrant colors and interactive screens draw me in, stirring thoughts on how humanity is propelled by continuous questioning and experimentation. There’s an energy of possibility—a space where ideas may become reality. I feel invited and stimulated by the fusion of art, science, and potential.
